zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Champernon於大約1272年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親William Champernon44歲，母親Joan de Ferrers20歲。他於1311年與Joan Bodrugan在英國戴文可利斯特 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1330年在英國戴文享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Champernon于大约1272年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲William Champernon44岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers20岁。他于1311年与Joan Bodrugan在英国戴文可利斯特 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1330年在英国戴文享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Champernon was born about 1272, in Devon, England, his father, William Champernon, was 44 and his mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 20. He married Joan Bodrugan in 1311, in Clyst St Mary, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1330, in Devon, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Champernon est né environ 1272, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Champernon, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Bodrugan en 1311, à Clyst St Mary, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1330, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Champernon um 1272 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Champernon 44 und seine Mutter Joan de Ferrers 20. Lui sposato Joan Bodrugan nel 1311, nel Clyst St Mary, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1330, nel Devon, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Champernonが約1272年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父William Champernonは44歳，母Joan de Ferrersは20歳であった。1311年にイギリスデボンクリスト スト マリーでJoan Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1330年にイギリスデボンで59歳で死去した。

ko.Of, Clist Champernon, Devonshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 클리스트 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Champernon(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Champernon(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1311년 영국 데폰 클리스트 스트 메리에서 Joan Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 영국 데폰에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Champernon nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Champernon, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Bodrugan em 1311, em Clyst St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1330, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.Of, Clist Champernon, Devonshire, Englan: клист ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Champernon родился около 1272 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Champernon было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Bodrugan в 1311 г. в местности клист ст мэри, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1330 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.
